description_long: This object appears to be a stylized doll with a simple, geometric form and minimal surface detail. The body is composed of broad, flat planes with a subtle peak at the top, suggesting a head or hat, and two sharply angled protrusions on either side that may represent arms or decorative elements. The surface is uniformly colored in a muted beige or light tan, with no visible facial features, clothing details, or textural variation. The overall silhouette is abstract and blocky, lacking the anatomical detail typical of realistic dolls. The object is solid and monolithic, with no visible joints or separable parts. Its design suggests a modern, minimalist interpretation of a doll, possibly intended as a toy or decorative figure.
description: A minimalist, geometric doll with a peaked top and two angular side protrusions, finished in a uniform beige color. The form is abstract and blocky, lacking facial or clothing details.
description_view_0: The view shows the top peak and broad, flat front surface, with the side protrusions barely visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights one of the sharply angled side protrusions, giving a clearer sense of the object's three-dimensionality.
description_view_2: A direct view of the broad, flat surface with both side protrusions visible, emphasizing the symmetrical, abstract form.
description_view_3: The opposite side protrusion is visible, mirroring the feature seen in view 1, with the flat surface receding.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing or garment details; the surface is a single, uniform color with no patterns or fashion elements.
attribute_pose: The form is static and upright, with a peaked top and two symmetrical, angular side protrusions; no discernible limbs or dynamic posture.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible on the surface.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle; the top is a smooth, peaked surface.
